perspectives.description: The friend who organized the surprise party, believing it to be a joyful celebration for the DECIDER. They are invested in ensuring everyone has a good time and feel appreciated.
The person for whom the surprise party is organized, who dislikes surprise gatherings and feels uncomfortable at the event. Their feelings and comfort are directly impacted by the situation.
A friend who is attending the party but is not directly involved in the planning. They care about both the host and the guest of honor and may feel conflicted about the situation.
